subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Truly, I say, complete capacity and ability is the cause of the appearance of the divine gifts.
subcodes.subjects: @attainment to faith in the twinkling of an eye, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @scarcity of receptive souls, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
